title: codegraph-contract-map.v1
description: Cross-repo contract map (Roadmap: CodeGraph MQ Integration → Delivery B). mqobsidian owns this metadata. Each record traces one MQ schema contract from its producer repo/symbol through its consumer repo to the command that verifies it. CodeGraph is used only for repo-local symbol evidence; repos are joined here through the declared contract record, NOT through a federated code graph. Values must be repo-relative paths, symbol names, or repo basenames — never absolute machine paths.

contract.description: The schema id this contract carries, e.g. `repo-review.v1`.

schema_source.description: Repo-relative path in mqobsidian to the owning schema, e.g. `schemas/repo-review.v1.json`. Provenance is required.

entrypoint.description: Repo-relative file or CLI command that emits the contract.

symbol.description: Repo-local implementation symbol (CodeGraph evidence). Omit when not yet implemented.

surface.description: Repo-relative read surface or consuming symbol, e.g. `memory/reviews/` or `mq_agent/tools/context_pack.py::build_task_pack`.

command.description: The command that verifies this contract end-to-end.
